zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham於1178年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德時，她的父親Robert de Ewyas39歲，母親Petronilla de Scudamore24歲。她於大約1190年與Robert de Tregoz I在英國賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1236年7月1日之前在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾騰波瑞，埋葬在英國賀福爾艾比 多雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham于1178年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德时，她的父亲Robert de Ewyas39岁，母亲Petronilla de Scudamore24岁。她于大约1190年与Robert de Tregoz I在英国賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1236年7月1日之前在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾騰波瑞，埋葬在英国賀福爾艾比 多雷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sibyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sybil .  Even in classical times there was confusion between the two vowels in this word.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham was born in 1178, in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Ewyas, was 39 and her mother, Petronilla de Scudamore, was 24. She married Robert de Tregoz I about 1190, in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died before 1 July 1236, in Tenbury, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibyl d’Ewyas Lady of Burneham est née en 1178, à Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert d’Ewyas, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Petronilla de Scudamore, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Tregoz I environ 1190, à Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1 juillet 1236, à Tenbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.Abbeydore, Herefordshire, England: Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham 1178 in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Ewyas 39 und ihre Mutter Petronilla de Scudamore 24. Sie hat um 1190 in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England Robert de Tregoz I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1. Juli 1236 in Tenbury, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham è nata il nel 1178 nel Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert de Ewyas, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Petronilla de Scudamore, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Tregoz I circa 1190, nel Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 1 luglio 1236, nel Tenbury, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burnehamが1178年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウヤス ハロルドで生まれた時，父Robert de Ewyasは39歳，母Petronilla de Scudamoreは24歳であった。約1190年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウヤス ハロルドでRobert de Tregoz Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1236年7月1日以前にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアテンブリーで死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアアビー ドーアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham(이)가 1178년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 와이아스 하로드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Ewyas(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Petronilla de Scudamore(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1190년 영국 허퍼드실르 와이아스 하로드에서 Robert de Tregoz I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1236년 7월 1일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 텐버이에서 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 애브브이 도어에 묻혔다.

pt.Abbeydore, Herefordshire, England: Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham nasceu em 1178, em Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Ewyas, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Petronilla de Scudamore, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Tregoz I aproximadamente 1190, em Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1 de julho de 1236, em Tenbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Abbeydore, Herefordshire, England: Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham родилась в 1178 г. в местности ювяс харолд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Ewyas было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Petronilla de Scudamore, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Tregoz I около 1190 г. в местности ювяс харолд, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 1 июля 1236 г. в местности тенбури, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности эбби дор, хирефордшир, Англия.

Se casó con Robert de Tregoz I aproximadamente 1190, en Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 1 de julio de 1236, en Tenbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
